description: This class includes raising and breeding of other animals such as semi-domesticated or wild animals, bees, silkworms, pet animals (except fish), and other animals not elsewhere classified.
includes: raising and breeding of semi-domesticated or wild animals: ostriches and emus; other birds (except poultry); insects; rabbits and other fur animals
production of furskins, reptile or bird skins from ranching operation
operation of worm farms, land mollusc farms, snail farms etc.
raising of silkworms, production of silkworm cocoons
raising of bees, production of honey and beeswax
raising and breeding of pet animals (except fish): cats and dogs; birds, such as parrots etc.; hamsters etc.
excludes: production of hides and skins from hunting and trapping, see 0170
pet care services (boarding, grooming, sitting), see 9609
